title: Herr Wichmann aus der dritten Reihe
original_title: Herr Wichmann aus der Dritten Reihe
overview: A new dramedic documentary about what politics and democracy mean when your working in the rough business of parlamentarian tasks, assemblies and your every day live in your constituency. Are there things that need to be changed?
